violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. -10 cases of food stored on the floor of the walk in freezer.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Wet cloth left at counter between uses at cook line.*COS moved to bucket. -Server and Dessert prep area Sani bucket were found with solutions less than 150ppm Quat.--Cloth or sanitizer solution for wiping food spills was not clean. -Cookline sani bucket cloudy.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Some residue build up behind nozzles of ice cream dispenser. -Heavy residue at blade of can opener.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Some dust behind monitors at cook line. -Ice build up at fans in walk in freezer. -Dust at top shelf of clean dish storage rack. -Splatter/debris at interior of ice cream machine door. -Crumbs at bottom interior of 4 door cake freezer.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical ware washing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration. -Dishwasher found with 0ppm Chlorine solution. *Line was completely dry, owner primed line while on-site. Ensure dishwasher maintains a sanitize solution of 50ppm Chlorine.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. -Cook rinsed temperature probe at hand sink (after checking gravy temperature. *Redirected immediately.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Thermometers provided, used, clean, and accurate (1 pt deducted)
Method, temperature and time (5 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
